title: Admin signs in and reaches the main dashboard
description: This verifies that an admin can log in and is redirected to the main dashboard with analytics visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the main dashboard is displayed

title: Create a new booking and see it appear in the schedule
description: This test verifies that an authenticated admin can create a booking from the bookings workspace and see the new reservation reflected in the schedule.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Fill in the required booking details with valid values
Verify the new booking appears in the bookings schedule
Verify the bookings list includes the new reservation

title: Guest signs a shared contract link
description: A guest can open a public contract link, review the contract, and complete signing with a confirmation shown afterward.

steps.description: Verify a signed confirmation is visible

title: Owner signs in and reaches the owner portal
description: This verifies that an owner can log in and is redirected to the owner portal dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the owner portal dashboard is displayed
Verify owned property information is visible

title: Worker signs in and reaches the worker tasks portal

title: Guest views check-in details from a valid token link

title: Invalid credentials show a sign-in error

steps.description: Fill in the email field with fake.user@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password

title: Guest link shows an empty or invalid access state
description: This test verifies that an invalid public guest token does not expose guest information and instead shows an access-related empty state.

steps.description: Verify an access-related empty state is displayed

title: Unauthorized public access is blocked from protected contract pages
